localizations.title: Arsène Lupin and the Great White Diamond
localizations.hiddenObject_2: Observe the left tower of Notre Dame's frontage.
localizations.code_1418: The box opens before your eyes filled with wonder: you hold the great diamond. Arsène is waiting for you at the bottom of the tree and congratulates you profusely. "You made it through the adventure, well done! Unfortunately, this diamond is a counterfeit. Of course, the real one is hidden at home. However, your sharpened mind deserves that I take you under my wing. I will probably need your talents at some point. See you soon on new adventures!"
localizations.hint_1: There is so many of them. Running away seems the best option.
localizations.hint_4: As most keys, it unlocks a door. Keep in mind that among the many others, this key is special.
localizations.hint_6_first: A hint about the Thief of the Roofs is at the Concorde. Keep in mind that you have to read again the newspaper.
localizations.hint_6: Are you sure the Thief of the Roofs is human?
localizations.hint_9: These marbles will come in handy if you meet more children.
localizations.hint_12: Useful for climbing. You will need it to nab the thief.
localizations.hint_15: This shape resembles a lot a specific letter.
localizations.hint_18_first: The arrows point to a path.  Use the map to solve this riddle.
localizations.hint_18: On the map, starting with the lion, go from one place to another (without revealing the cards) to find the next stopover.
localizations.hint_20: It's not much but still, it could be used for a purchase.
localizations.hint_23_first: The initials of these two locations are the key.
localizations.hint_23: The next stopover is between (N)otre-Dame and (R)épublique. What letter does this correspond to?
localizations.hint_25: The ticket indicates the next stopover. Now, you must go there.
localizations.hint_26: When placed on the right spot, this business card reveals a padlock code.
localizations.hint_29_first: You must choose the right balloons and write down the letters they indicate sequentially.
localizations.hint_29:
The order is that of your path since start:
Denfert/Montmartre/Notre-Dame/Montparnasse/the Eiffel Tower.
localizations.hint_31: On the gargoyle's arm, clock's hands are depicted.
localizations.hint_34: Pay close attention to details: mustache, collar, gloves, vest, and pants.
localizations.hint_35: You don't have 5 centimes, but maybe he'd give you a newspaper for less.
localizations.hint_43_first: To find the right time, you must look for the creature on the frontage of Notre-Dame and follow the indications provided by the newspaper.
localizations.hint_43: The creature will give you the position of both hands and the newspaper will give you instructions on changing the hours.
localizations.hint_44: You only have to give him your 2 centimes.
localizations.hint_50: You run off down the stairs. There must be a way to make Marcel's gang slip.
localizations.hint_52_first: When placed on the right spot, this business card reveals a padlock code.
localizations.hint_52: You already saw Lupin's monogram at the very start of the adventure.
localizations.hint_53_first: You must choose the right balloons and write down the letters they indicate sequentially.
localizations.hint_53:
The order is that of your path since start:
Denfert/Montmartre/Notre-Dame/Montparnasse/the Eiffel Tower.
localizations.hint_67_first: If you watch the movie in slow motion, you will find a card number.
localizations.hint_67: The number appears on a man's back who is running.
localizations.hint_71_first: The sentence in the newspaper "But no books…" is a decyphering method. Find how it works, then, and only then, apply it to the books.
localizations.hint_75_first: The arrows point to a path.  Use the map to solve this riddle.
localizations.hint_75: On the map, starting with the lion, go from one place to another (without revealing the cards) to find the next stopover.
localizations.hint_86: Recreate the puzzle; streams are good landmarks. The 4 arrows will then point to your next stopover.
localizations.hint_87: Recreate the puzzle; streams are good landmarks. The 4 arrows will then point to your next stopover.
localizations.hint_88: Recreate the puzzle; streams are good landmarks. The 4 arrows will then point to your next stopover.
localizations.hint_89: Recreate the puzzle; streams are good landmarks. The 4 arrows will then point to your next stopover.
localizations.hint_90: Pay close attention to details: mustache, collar, gloves, vest, and pants.
localizations.hint_95: To open this door, you need a key. One is hiding among the cards. Have you noticed that numbers do not go beyond 99 ? Then, there's only one combination left to try.
localizations.hint_100_first: Look at the map. You will find colors for North, South, East, and West.
localizations.hint_100: For the other points, you must mix the colors (for example: blue + yellow = green).
localizations.answer_hint_6: The Thief of the Roofs is a magpie. Now, you must climb to its nest.
localizations.answer_hint_23: P is between N and R in the alphabet (N/o/P/q/R).
localizations.answer_hint_26: Place the card on the letter while matching the monogram to the signature. The fingers will reveal 4 numbers: 1418.
localizations.answer_hint_29: Palais. You must go to the Grand Palais gardens.
localizations.answer_hint_43: The gargoyle indicates 9:35. The newspaper instructs us to turn the clock forward one hour. Therefore, the time to be entered is 10:35.
localizations.answer_hint_50: Use the marbles (9) to make Marcel's gang slip down the stairs (50).
localizations.answer_hint_52: Place the map on the letter while matching the monogram to the signature. The fingers will reveal 4 numbers: 1418.
localizations.answer_hint_53: Palais. You must go to the Grand Palais gardens.
localizations.answer_hint_67: Number 39 appears on a man's back at about the end of the movie.
localizations.answer_hint_71: Take the first letter of Madame Bovary, the second of Notre Dame de Paris, etc. Thus, you will obtain "Montparnasse".
localizations.answer_hint_90: Mustache, white collar, no buttons, gloves, striped pants. You must pick the 4th.
localizations.answer_hint_95: Only card 99 is left among cards 95 through 100. Therefore, the key value is 4.
localizations.answer_hint_100: Going (clockwise) from the North: Blue / Sky-blue / White / Pink / Red / Orange / Yellow / Green.
localizations.machine_43: The clock's face pivots and reveals a secret compartment.
localizations.machine_90: You identify the man who hands you over a ticket
localizations.machine_100: The manhole cover unblocks and reveals a ladder that sinks into darkness
localizations.event_2: The whole bunch of Marcel's gang surrounds you. They will not let you continue without a fight. Be shrewd! Stop your investigation.
localizations.machine_43_almost: Well done, but you need another piece of information to move forward.
localizations.machine_53_answer: Palais. You must go to the Grand Palais gardens. Take card J.
